def positive_cross_cutting_policies_embedded_in_leaf_modules_instead_of_shared_boundary():
    rule_id = "cross_cutting_policies_embedded_in_leaf_modules_instead_of_shared_boundary"
    family = "structure"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag retries, normalization, or policy checks embedded in leaf modules instead of one shared boundary."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
